market_pulse: EDC Week momentum continues with talent announcements dominating the Strip; LIV Beach leads with David Guetta, Zouk/Hakkasan strengthen with premium headliners, OMNIA Dayclub ramps summer positioning.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Major talent on every venue (Guetta, RL Grime, Swae Lee, DJ Drama)
LIV Beach has 3-day confirmed lineup (Discolines 5/22, Guetta 5/23, John Summit 5/24)
Hakkasan & Zouk both have premium bookings tonight and Saturday
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize LIV Beach exposure with Guetta performance content; bundle 3-day passes for weekend warriors; push influencer partnerships on John Summit engagement (high-value millennial demographic).

content_gaps.description: Competitors (XS, OMNIA, Zouk) actively posting BTS setup/stage prep content; LIV posting primarily talent announcements only.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 2-3 short BTS clips showing LIV Beach Guetta stage setup, sound check, or dancer prep for Stories; upload to TT with #GuestaMX trending audio.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leveraging guest UGC heavily; LIV has minimal repost strategy visible in search results.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVWeekend repost campaign; incentivize attendees to tag @livbeachlasvegas; feature 3-5 best UGC daily on Stories.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub, Zouk posting hourly countdown/teaser content for weekend events; LIV using static announcements.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Push hourly countdown reels to IG/TT grid starting Thursday 5/23 for John Summit Sunday set; use trending remixes as audio.

influencer_activity.mention: Confirmed LIV Beach performer tonight (5/22); high-engagement EDM influencer with 2.1M TT followers; likely driving bookings.
Saturday 5/23 LIV Beach headline; official announcement posted to @livbeach; mega-influencer, likely 10K+ direct followers cross-posted.
Sunday 5/24 LIV Beach; user TT video from 3 weeks ago showing attendee excitement; trending audio alignment.
Zouk Nightclub tonight (5/22); competitor talent draw; rap/hip-hop crossover appeal.
Zouk Nightclub Saturday (5/23); electronic/trap headliner; strong TT algorithm presence.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Travel/Vegas content creator; mentioned LIV Beach in recent spring break vlog; 500K+ followers; good micro-influencer tier for UGC reposts.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: DM offer of free table/bottle service for Sunday John Summit set; request TT/IG coverage with #LIVWeekend

liv_outreach_targets.reason: XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers; well-positioned in Vegas nightlife; potential partnership or cross-promotion.
liv_outreach_targets.suggested_action: Reach out re: LIV Beach cross-promotions for Memorial Day; offer commission on direct bookings.
